title: Combination
description: Allows you to combine slabs and stairs back into blocks
body:
Unlock the power of versatility with the Combination Datapack/Mod! This innovative tool allows you to seamlessly merge blocks like stairs and slabs back into their original block forms. Perfect for those moments when you accidentally craft the wrong item or simply need to repurpose your materials

# Examples
